CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-27-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Medline Industries, Inc.
Off Calendar May-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brian Johnson of The Chanler Group telephone number 510-848-8880 for Plaintiffs Anthony Held and John Moore.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS ANTHONY HELD and JOHN MOORE'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Medline Industries, Inc. is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Order and a separate judgment signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/HK)
